text:
The web searches returned no results containing the exact title or any closely matching paper by Vasic et al. in the Journal of Biomechanics. Combined with the fact that the automated checkers found no record in any academic database, and the provided URL could not be verified, there is strong evidence this reference is fabricated.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: The exact title was not found in any web search results, and the automated checkers confirmed it is absent from all major academic databases (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, DBLP, arXiv). No dedicated journal page or academic entry with this title and these authors could be located.
LINK: NONE
